sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state - ring didn't seem to move
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'p' and n['pixels'] > 1:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        ring_center = (sum(rows)//len(rows), sum(cols)//len(cols))
        print(f"Ring at {ring_center}, px={n['pixels']}")
    if n['color'] == 'G' and n['pixels'] > 1:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        target_center = (sum(rows)//len(rows), sum(cols)//len(cols))
        print(f"Target at {target_center}, px={n['pixels']}")

# Check if ring and target are overlapping/merged
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nBottom area:")
for i in range(55, 63):
    if i < len(ascii_lines):
        row_str = ascii_lines[i][24:32]
        if 'p' in row_str or 'G' in row_str or 'M' in row_str:
            print(f"  Row {i}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
